title: Simple rate equations, orders of reaction and rate constants
summary: 9701 A Level kinetics — rate equations, orders, half-life, and Arrhenius with PhET reactions sim.
learningObjectives: Deduce rate equations from experimental data.
Calculate order and units of rate constant k.
Apply half-life relationships for first order.

simpleExplanation.title: Rate = k[A]^m[B]^n
simpleExplanation.summary: Orders come from experiment, not stoichiometry. First-order reactions have constant half-life.
steps: Initial rates method — compare rates when [A] doubles.
Units of k depend on overall order.
Arrhenius: k increases with T — Ea from ln k vs 1/T plot.

sections.content: **Rate equations** (26.1) extend AS **8.1–8.2**. **Orders from graphs** and **units of k** are examined every year.
